one_time_description: Prior period adjustment to opening surplus to record certain assets and liabilities not recorded in prior-year financial statements
economic_notes: First Nation operates Video Lotto Terminals (VLT) and a Smoke Shop. Significant construction in progress of $71,993,536 including water/sewer and wastewater treatment plant projects. Committed to weekly VLT payments of $937 ($48,724 annually) to Manitoba Liquor and Lotteries.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to verify opening balances of certain assets and liabilities. Prior year (2019) figures are unaudited and were compiled by another accounting firm. Significant construction in progress of $71,993,536 on balance sheet. Prior period adjustment of $2,923,720 recorded to opening surplus. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $13,728,636 + Health Canada $2,847,555 + Province of Manitoba $3,669,330 + CMHC $70,388 = $20,315,909. OSR includes rent, tobacco tax rebates, VLT revenue, other revenue, and net transfer from unexpended funding. Net financial assets is positive $1,267,371 (net assets position). 9 entities consolidated including Band, Education Authority, Employment and Training, Health Authority, Housing Authority, Multiplex Construction Project, Smoke Shop, Video Lotto, and 10027260 Manitoba Ltd. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided.
